CustomObject.description: One-time-use magic-link tokens for restoring an in-app-deleted account during its 30-day grace window. Issued by FimbyReactivationController when (a) a neighbour taps Delete with the grace option (token emailed in confirmation) or (b) a neighbour visits /account-paused and requests a fresh link. Each token expires after Reactivation_Token_TTL_Hours (default 24) and is single-use.
CustomObject.label: Reactivation Token
